name: omx
description: Install and verify the oh-my-codex (OMX) workflow layer for OpenAI Codex CLI.

interface.longDescription: Adds a setup skill that detects missing Codex/OMX binaries, installs them when needed, then runs `omx setup` and `omx doctor` to verify the workflow layer is ready.
defaultPrompt: Run /omx:setup to install Codex and OMX if missing, then verify with omx doctor.
Check whether my environment is ready for omx --madmax --high and fix missing prerequisites.
Set up OMX and show the canonical $deep-interview -> $ralplan -> $ralph/$team flow.
